item.title: This all happens in kitchens. Japanese things are attracting me now ...
item.description:
Cooking "Thor's Hammer" for 29hrs (67lbs cow leg).
One of the most impressive slicing skills I have ever seen.
She was caught in the act.
Making (a lot of) takoyaki.
The process of making matcha mochi donuts!
The Satisfying Process Of Making Dome Castella - Japanese Food.
Second omelette looks impossible to make!
This is what I'm doing with my next watermelon.
Nobody washes their hands anymore.
Peeling garlic with tweezers.
Fullstar.
Pasta cutting machine shows how it can be mass produced.
Wrapping a bag of tea as a gift without tape.
Old School Coffee Maker.
Perfect noodle drip.
Egg fryer.
Insesamination.
Potato Slicing Machine.
Commercial potato peeler and chipper.
Now i just need a friend.
Lunchbox.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.dc:creator: tanukiicos

item.title: General Daniel Chappie James Jr. in 1975 on not deserving his title.
item.description: RESPECT General! THIS IS AMERICA, and IDK WTF last month's garbage is ultimately doing with this country, but the USAF I served operated on "Integrity First, Service Before Self, and Excellence In All We Do". This is the "Airman's Creed" and despite separating over 15 years ago I sill hold these ideals as my compass to this day. I just hope that any General operating under this criminal president holds tight to their integrity because the order to "shoot American citizens" WILL BE coming
item.dc:creator: ironman3010

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Commute collectibles
item.dc:creator: expiredgiftedandtalentedstudent

item.title: Laser printers, people.
item.description: tl;dr: Buy a laser printer. Unless you need to print tons of photos, buy a black-and-white laser printer. If you want colour, colour laser pritners aren't much more. Do NOT buy HP anything. Brother is, among others, a pretty decent brand. I did tech support for HP DeskJet printers back in the 90s. They were pretty good. But around 1996 is when it changed. HP all around went downhill, and now for 30 years they have been crap. No excuse for buying HP. It's crap. Buy a laser printer. I like being able to print in colour, so I bought a Brother colour laser 8 years ago. I don't print that often. I've replaced the black cartridge twice and some of the colours - still haven't replaced magenta. It's still trucking along perfectly and has worked with each version of Windows and Linux just fine. The ONLY reason to buy inkjet is if you print a TON of photographs. Ink is expensive and finicky - it dries and clogs. If you occasionally need photos printed in high quality, use a printing service. It's worth it - they're not expensive and it's much much cheaper than throwing away expensive ink at home.
item.dc:creator: daychilde

item.title: Is that a leopard over there?

item.title: Judge Immergut (A Trump Appointed Judge) BLOCKS Trump's Federalization And Deployment Of The Oregon National Guard To Portland
item.description:
Judge Immergut BLOCKS Trump's federalization of the Oregon National Guard, writing that the govt has "made a range of arguments that, if accepted, risk blurring the line between civil and military federal power–to the detriment of this nation."
"This country has a longstanding and foundational tradition of resistance to government overreach, especially in the form of military intrusion into civil affairs." ... "This historical tradition boils down to a simple proposition: this is a nation of Constitutional law, not martial law."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.description:
1
2

9

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @volzartstudio painted these pumpkins, I love the texture. Please check out their other works.
27 Man Tax: By request, John Barrowman
“To put everything in balance is good, to put everything in harmony is better.” - Victor Hugo I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work and pretty destitute. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, thank you so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #247
item.description: ? The crackdown is here. Trump is sending 300 National Guard troops into Chicago over the governor and mayor's objections. Border Patrol shot a second citizen there today. Trump tried sending troops to Portland too, but a federal judge stopped him. Running afoul of the government has consequences. DOJ wants to add 22+ years to a woman's sentence for the attempted assassination of Brett Kavanaugh three years ago. And a Venezuelan singer who migrated legally and won asylum was held more than 2 months past that date. He released an anti-deportation song two months before his detention. There is no more time for you to consider. You have to be building resistance to this every day in your community with your federal, state, and local officials. That's the only way out now because the officials enabling Trump are building authoritarian infrastructure that will outlast him. Meanwhile, don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/kushner-witkoff-gaza-deal [2] https://go.govbrief.today/gov-shutdown-als-fundraiser [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-minors-ruling-court [4] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-power-takeover-approved [5] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-stops-guard-deployment [6] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-national-guard-trump [7] https://go.govbrief.today/kavanaugh-assassin-sentence-appeal [8] https://go.govbrief.today/agents-shoot-chicago-woman [9] https://go.govbrief.today/venezuelan-musician-ice-detention [10] https://go.govbrief.today/student-loan-forgiveness-restart [11] https://go.govbrief.today/h1b-visa-lawsuit-filed
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
